error_signature: missing required scope for Slack API
title: Missing required scope for Slack API access
symptom: When trying to access Slack channels in n8n, the user receives an error indicating missing required scopes and cannot see any channels.
applies_when: Attempting to list channels in a workflow
not_this_if: All required scopes are already granted
root_cause: The error occurs because the Slack API access token does not have the necessary permissions (scopes) to access private channels or list conversations. Without the correct scopes, n8n cannot retrieve the channel information.
fix_steps: Go to your Slack app settings
Add the `conversations.list` scope and any other necessary scopes for private channels
Reinstall the app to apply the new scopes
Try accessing the channels in n8n again
agent_instruction: Ensure the Slack API token has the `conversations.list` scope and any required scopes for private channels.
